title: Survey or Vote in an Update?
excerpt:
All, 
Does anyone know if it is possible to ask a question in an update with a multiple choice response? I have to ask about 65 people a yes or no question, and would rather not have each person reply to the original upd…

posts.author: Nickt (Nick Tool)
posts.cookedHtml:
All,

Does anyone know if it is possible to ask a question in an update with a multiple choice response? I have to ask about 65 people a yes or no question, and would rather not have each person reply to the original update. I would like to just have a vote option.

Alternatively, I could send people an entire board with a single item and only 2 vote columns, but that seems worse.

I searched around in Monday and again here on the forums, but wasn’t successful.

Is this something that can be done in updates without resorting to the Monday Marketplace Microtransaction Madness?

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Nickt - nothing I can think of at the moment. A possible workaround could be to send a form link out with the question, that way everyone is not having to navigate to a board? Then you can summarize the responses in the board behind?

Thanks
Mark

Green Llamas
